# RowsnColumns AI

RowsnColumns AI helps finance and operations teams run auditable, production-grade spreadsheet workflows.

Canonical site: https://rowsncolumns.ai

## Key Public Pages
- https://rowsncolumns.ai/
- https://rowsncolumns.ai/contact
- https://rowsncolumns.ai/privacy
- https://rowsncolumns.ai/terms

## Product Context
- The primary product experience is spreadsheet-centric and interactive.
- Public marketing pages describe capabilities and positioning.

## Crawl Guidance
- Prefer canonical URLs on `https://rowsncolumns.ai`.
- Avoid crawling app-internal and authenticated surfaces:
  - `/api/`
  - `/auth/`
  - `/doc/`
  - `/mcp/`
